children.name: Carybdea
children.description: Carybdea — a genus of carybdeid jellyfish in the family Carybdeidae.

children.name: Carybdea marsupialis
children.description: Carybdea marsupialis or  Mediterranean Box Jelly is a venomous species of box jellyfish, in the small family Carybdeidae within the class Cubozoa.

children.name: Carybdea xaymacana
children.description: Carybdea xaymacana is a venomous species of cnidarian, in the small family Carybdeidae within the class Cubozoa. The species has been documented off the coast of Mexico and Australia. To distinguish this species from other cubozoans along the Mexican coasts, one can note its four pedalia, each containing a single tentacle, and its heart-shaped rhopaliar niche ostium.
